title: UI Components
description: Display rich UI components to users such as interactive cards and multiple-choice options. These skills enable agents to present structured, visually appealing content instead of plain text.

ui_show_card.title: Show Card
ui_show_card.description: Display a rich card with title, description, optional image, and an action button linking to a URL.

ui_ask_user.title: Ask User
ui_ask_user.description: Present the user with 2-3 clickable options to choose from. Each option has a title and description.

states.description: States for each UI skill (disabled, public, or private)
